Due to the limited number of emails we c: Pro li limitat númere de e-postes que noi posse sender chascun die, por prevenir problemas de login pos attinger li limite de sendation, ples assecurar adjunter additional login optiones quam backups pos in-logar.

Enable this option to increase synchroni: Activar ti option por augmentar li synchronisation velocitá. Vor lectura progresso, notas, emfases, marca-págines e altri data concernent lectura va esser archivat e sincronisat per nor nube servicie; vor libros e covres va ancor esser sincronisat per vor adjuntet data-fontes. Desactivar ti option va remover li supra data de nor nube.
Access may be unstable in China: Access posse esser instabil in China
Only WebDAV service provided by Alist is: Solmen li WebDAV servicie providet per Alist es directmen supportat in li navigator. Altri WebDAV servicies debe activar CORS por funcionar corectmen. By default, Koodo Reader will automatica: Per defaulte, Koodo Reader va automaticmen sincronisar vor data quande vu aperi li application e quande vu surtir lectura
This endpoint usually don't contain buck: Ti endpoint usualmen ne contene un bucket nómine
Reset main window's position: Reinitialisar li position del fenestre principal
7-days free trial only applies to users: Li 7-dies free trial aplica solmen a usatores qui ha registrat con recomendat e-post providers. Recomendat e-post providers es li sequent
In the future, we will introduce more me: In li futur, noi va introduir plu membra-exclusiv functiones, includente lectura statisticas e automatic synchronisation de vor notas, emfases, lectura progresso, e vocabularium listes a plataformas quam Notion, Obsidian, Logseq, Anki, e plu.
Once you exit the Pro version, you will: Pos vu surtir li Pro version, vu ne va plu poder usar synchronisation e altri premium functiones
When the spacing between two lines of te: Quande li spacie inter du lineas es n vezes del normal, ili va esser divisat in du paragrafes
After hiding the menu button, you can mo: Pos celar li menu buton, vu posse mover li mouse al bord del fenestre por monstrar it denov.

Server path (Please first create this fo: Servitor path (Ples first create this folder manually)
Automatically launch on system startup: Automaticmen lansar al startup del sistema

Desactivar auto-rular al sequent o previ capitul quande attinger li fin del actual capitul
To reduce storage usage, only the book m: Por reducer li usage de stocage, solmen li metadata del libro es descargat per defaulte, e li files del libro ne es descargat. Pos activar ti option, omni files del libro va esser descargat durant synchronisation
Main window will be maximized to fit the: Li fenestre principal va esser maximizat por ajustar al ecran quande lansat
Your Pro trial has expired, please renew: Vor Pro trial ha expirat; ples renovar por continuar usar li Pro functiones
This data source cannot be accessed from: Ti data-fonte ne posse esser accessat del navigator pro politica CORS. Ples cambiar a un altri data-fonte o a un CORS-activat provider.
This data source cannot be accessed due: Ti data-fonte ne posse esser accessat pro securitá politica del navigator. Ples cambiar a un altri data-fonte o HTTPS-basat provider.
Hide page scale button: Celar li buton de págine scala
Hide pdf to text button: Celar li buton PDF a textu
Use file name as book title: Uar li file-nómine quam titulo de libro
With the integration of popular cloud st: Con li integration de popular nube stocage servicies, WebDAV, FTP, SFTP, SMB, Docker e object stocage, omni vor data resta securmen sub vor control
The 115 cloud is only recommended for VI: Li 115 nube es recomendat solmen por VIP usatores, pro que it es quasi ínusabil por free usatores. Anc, pro API problemas con 115 nube, synchronisation posse esser tre lent. Si vu insiste usar 115 nube stocage por sync, on recomanda activar Koodo Sync simultanmen, quo va signicativmen meliorar li synchronisation velocitá.
Request timed out, You may change the se: Request timed out, You may change the server region to China to solve the connection issue in mainland China. Go to Parametres > Conto

Failed to read file, please refresh and: Fallit to read file, please refresh and grant directory access again

If you didn't receive the verification c: Si vu ne recipet li verification code, ples verificar li spam dossier o usar un altri e-post provider
In order to let you directly manage your: In order to let you directly manage your data in Google Drive, we have deprecated the old Google Drive token. Ples reauthorize Google Drive in the settings. Your new data will be stored in the root directory of your Google Drive, and you can manage it directly in the Google Drive web interface.
You have exhausted your daily free AI vo: Tu ha exhaustet tui quotidian gratuit quota de caracteres de voce AI. Ples compra plu quota por continuar usar ti function o atender til li quota restitue se. Tu posse usar altri voces TTS in vice.
Audio loading failed, stopped playback: Cargament de audio fallit, reproduction haltat
We have two server regions(Global and Ch: Noi have du regiones de servitor (Global e China). Por changear li region de servitor, tu deve primarimen deslogar. Esque tu vole deslogar nu?
To enjoy a faster and seamless synchroni: Por joyar un plu rapid e sin-juntura experientie de sincronisation.
Your reading progress, notes, highlights: Tui progress de lectura, notas, highlightes, marcapages e altri datos va esser stored e sincronisat tra nor nube servicie. Tui libres e covritures va ancor esser sincronisat per tui addit fontes de datos. Omni tui datos va esser encryptet e securmen stored in nor nube. Tu posse desfacilita ti function irgue témpor in li ajustes.
Data in other devices is messed up, but: Datos in altri aparates es ínordinat, ma li datos in ti aparate es normal. Tu posse resetter li registre de sincronisation in ti aparate, deleer li KoodoReader/config annu in li fonte de datos (spegne Koodo Sync si necessi), e sincronisar denov. To deve soluer li problema
Tasks failed after multiple retries, ple: Taches fallit pos multiple retries, ples verificar li conexion de rede o reautorizar li fonte de datos in li ajustes
This data source already contains a libr: Ti fonte de datas ja contene un biblioteca. Si tu besona merger local e nube datos, ples spegner Koodo Sync e resincronisar.
Overwrite the default text style in the: Superscrir li standard stil de texte in li libre
AI voice character quota: Quota de caracteres de voce AI
Once the daily free quota is exhausted,: Unque li quotidian gratuit quota es exhaustet, li sistema va comensar deducir de tui comprat quota. Li contation de caracteres es calculat quam seque, chascun lettre e punctuation mark conta quam un caracter.
You can also use the desktop app to avoi: Tu posse usar li desktop app por evitar ti problema.
Please select the books in the Google Dr: Ples selecter li libres in li Google Drive Selector
To delete your account, you need to use: Por deleer tui conto, tu deve usar li mobil app. Pos logar, vade a Ajustes → Conto, e seque li instructiones.
Some of your books are currently not dow: Alcun de tui libres actualmen ne es downloadat al local. Changear li standard option de sincronisation posse ducter a perde de datos. Noi recomanda downloadar omni libres al local per activar Auto download de nube libres in li ajuste ante changear li standard option de sincronisation. Clacca 'OK' por proceder sin downloadar.
The default sync options in the local an: Li standard options de sincronisation in li local e nube es ínconsistent, ples ajustar li local standard option de sincronisation a
Restoring from a snapshot will overwrite: Restituer de un instantané va superscrir tui actual datos. Esque tu es cert que tu vole continuar?
Each time you open Koodo Reader, it auto: Chascun vez que tu aperte Koodo Reader, it automaticmen crea un instantané de tui biblioteca (exceptet libres e covritures). Tu posse usar ti instantanés por restituer tui biblioteca a un previe state. Ples notar que restituer de un instantané va superscrir tui actual datos
This code has already been used, if you: Ti code ja esset usat, si tu ha redemptet it antey, ne es necessi redemter it denov. Nur logar al sam conto por usar Pro functiones
7-day free trial upon registration, then: 7-die gratuit proval al registration, poy facturat annualmen

Can't find Koodo Reader's folder in the: Ne posse trovar li annu de Koodo Reader in li standard iCloud via, ples confirmar que iCloud Drive es installat e ajustat corectmen, e que tu ja ha sincronisat tui biblioteca a iCloud Drive sur li iOS version primarimen.

Please install local fonts to your machi: Ples installar local fontes a tui machine e poy restarter li application. Li installat fonte va aparer automaticmen in li liste dropdown.
AI-generated content is for reference on: AI-generat contenete es sol por referentie. Ples verificar atentivmen pro que it ne constitue professional avise.
Enter 1 to enable, leave empty to disabl: Intra 1 por activar, lassa vacui por desfacilitar. Necesi por alcun S3 servicies de storage que ne es compatibil con virtual host stile URL
Your trial will expire in: Tui trial va expirar in {{ttl}} dies, ples renovar in témpor por continuar usar li functiones Pro
Enter book download URL or article URL: Intra libre download URL o articul URL
Please enter a valid http or https URL: Ples intra un valid http o https URL
Show number of books in each shelf: Monstra nr. de libres in chascun estante
You can add models manually by selecting: Tu posse addir models manualmen per selecter li custom model
Automatically sync your library with clo: Automaticmen sincronisar tui biblioteca con nube ye li specificat intervalle.
Failed to fetch metadata from cloud: Recuperation de metadata de nube fallit
The new sync interval will take effect a: Li nov intervalle de sincronisation va efecter pos restarter Koodo Reader
Unsupported language for word definition: Ne-supportat lingue por definition de parol, actualmen solmen Chinese, Japanese e English es supportat
Auto sync new words to Eudic: Automaticmen sincronisar nov paroles a Eudic
When you look up a word, it will be auto: Quande tu sercha un parol, it va esser automaticmen sincronisat a tui Eudic studie liste
Enter your Eudic NIS access token: Intra tui Eudic NIS access token
Enter the study list name: Intra li nómine de studie liste
Language code, e.g. en / fr / de / es: Code de lingue, p.ex. en / fr / de / es
Auto sync new words to AnkiConnect: Automaticmen sincronisar nov paroles a AnkiConnect
When you look up a word, it will be auto: Quande tu sercha un parol, it va esser automaticmen addit a un Ancki deck per AnkiConnect (deve ear localmen)
Enable seperate style for this book: Activar separat stile por ti libre
Suitable for novels with number chapter: Adecuat por romanés con numeric capítul titules, p.ex. 1, 2, 3
You are using the latest version: Tu usa li max recent version
Auto sync notes and highlights to IMA: Automaticmen sincronisar notas e highlightes a IMA
Auto sync notes and highlights to SiYuan: Automaticmen sincronisar notas e highlightes a SiYuan
Please enable network serving in SiYuan: Ples activar rete servida in SiYuan - Ajustes - Pri, e confirmar que SiYuan ea ye sincronisation
Add definition next to the English, Chin: Addir definition apu li English, Chinese, Japanese paroles
Suitable for most txt files: Adecuat por max parte de txt files
Suitable for most Chinese novels, eg. 第一: Adecuat por max parte de Chinese romanés, p.ex. 第一章，第2回
Suitable for most English novels, eg. Ch: Adecuat por max parte de English romanés, p.ex. Chapter 1, Part II
Enter password to unlock the app: Intra parol-clave por desblocar li app
Authentication required to access the ap: Authentication requt por acceder li app
Enter PIN to unlock the app: Intra PIN por desblocar li app
PINs do not match, please try again: PINs ne coincide, ples provar denov
Passwords do not match or input is empty: Parol-claves ne coincide o intrada es vacui
When enabled, the app will require authe: Quande activat, li app va requirer authentication a chascun lanceament
Use a custom password to protect the app: Usar un custom parol-clave por proteger li app
Use a 6-digit PIN to protect the app: Usar un 6-digital PIN por proteger li app
Use Touch ID or Windows Hello to protect: Usar Touch ID o Windows Hello por proteger li app
Use biometric authentication to unlock t: Usar biometric authentication por desblocar li app
Biometric authentication failed, please: Biometric authentication fallit, ples provar denov
Biometric authentication is not availabl: Biometric authentication ne es disponibil sur ti aparate
Due to browser security restrictions, yo: Pro restrictions de securitá de browser, tu posse ne usar ti fonte de datas corectmen. Si tu incontra problemas, tu posse soluer les per installar nor browser extension.
You have reached the device limit for yo: Tu ha atinget li limite de aparates por tui conto. Ples installar li max recent mobil version de Koodo Reader por remover ínusat aparate per visitar Ajustes - Conto - Gestion de Aparates.
Auto sync reading progress with KOReader: Automaticmen sincronisar lectura progress con KOReader
Clicking the sync button will sync readi: Claccant li buton de sincronisation va sincronisar lectura progress inter Koodo Reader e KOReader con servitor de sincronisation de KOReader.
Leave blank to keep the current password: Lassa vacui por mantener li actual parol-clave
Please configure the KOReader sync serve: Ples configurar li KOReader sincronisation servitor primarimen
